_comment: MacroTilt data element registry per project Data Steward standards. Every element on the site has source, ingestion mode, owner, cadence, freshness SLA, and registered consumers. Schema bootstrapped 2026-05-04 with the broker-import element; existing elements (FRED daily, Massive EOD, etc.) to be backfilled in subsequent Data Steward PRs.

market.option-mark-uw.name: Option contract mark (NBBO mid, per-contract)
market.option-mark-uw.cadence: daily, 16:30 ET weekdays (post-close mark) — driven by Vercel cron in vercel.json (schedule: 30 20 * * 1-5 UTC during EDT)
market.option-mark-uw.refresh_trigger: Vercel cron hits /api/options-mark-batch with CRON_SECRET. Function pulls every open option position across all users, computes mark = (nbbo_bid + nbbo_ask) / 2 (fallback last_price), writes positions.price = mark * multiplier and positions.manual_price = mark.
market.option-mark-uw.freshness_chip: green if last refresh < 20h, amber 20-72h, red >72h or upstream failure
consumer_surfaces: Portfolio Insights — every option row's CURRENT VALUE / unrealized P&L
TickerDetailModal — option positions in the HELD POSITIONS list
PositionEditor (option block) — CURRENT MARK / SHARE is now optional; live mark fills automatically after the next batch run
market.option-mark-uw.ingestion_path: Vercel serverless api/options-mark-batch.js -> UW historic endpoint -> Supabase positions table (service-role UPDATE).
market.option-mark-uw.dedup_strategy: Idempotent UPDATE by position id; running twice in a row is safe and just overwrites with the same value.
market.option-mark-uw.failure_mode: Per-position try/catch — one bad OCC symbol or one transient UW 429 does not take down the batch. Failed rows are accumulated into the response details[] for log inspection. Two consecutive failures across the batch should auto-file a P1 bug per project rule (TODO: wire alert).

portfolio.transactions-broker-import.name: Broker transaction history (user-uploaded)
portfolio.transactions-broker-import.source_vendor: Chase J.P. Morgan brokerage CSV export (today). Schwab, Fidelity TBD.
portfolio.transactions-broker-import.cadence: ad-hoc (user uploads when they want to refresh)
portfolio.transactions-broker-import.refresh_trigger: User clicks 'Import broker trades' button on Portfolio Insights and submits a CSV via the ImportTransactions modal.
portfolio.transactions-broker-import.freshness_chip: none — user-driven refresh, freshness UX tracked via the most recent executed_at on public.transactions for the user.
consumer_surfaces: Portfolio Insights → Realized P&L tile (useTransactionsLedger hook)
portfolio.transactions-broker-import.dedup_strategy: Server-side dedup on (user_id, account_id, ticker, asset_class, side, abs(quantity), executed_at::date). Re-uploading the same file is safe.
portfolio.transactions-broker-import.failure_mode: RPC raises → modal shows the error in plain English. Per-row errors are returned in the response payload (errors[]) and rendered inline.

scanner.insider-history-uw.name: Insider transaction history (UW)
scanner.insider-history-uw.refresh_trigger: Nightly at 02:00 ET — INSIDER_INGEST_NIGHTLY.yml runs trading-scanner/scanner/signal_intelligence_v4/insider_ingest.py over the prior day.
scanner.insider-history-uw.freshness_chip: green if last ingested_at < 36h, amber if 36-72h, red if >72h
consumer_surfaces: Trading Opportunities (/#portopps) — every ticker that runs through the v4.1 first-buy classifier
Every ticker modal that shows v4.1 / MT Score data
scanner.insider-history-uw.dedup_strategy: Primary key (id from UW). UPSERT with Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates. Re-runs are idempotent.
scanner.insider-history-uw.failure_mode: UW endpoint does not honor a ticker filter at our API tier — backfill pulls global stream by date range and filters client-side. Rate limits handled with exponential backoff in upsert_batch / fetch_chunk.

realecon.ism_mfg.name: ISM Manufacturing PMI
realecon.ism_mfg.failure_mode: scrape returns no parseable rows OR site blocks bot
realecon.ism_mfg.registered_via: Joe directive 2026-05-10 — ISM v2 spec + bug #1178

realecon.ism_svc.name: ISM Services PMI
realecon.ism_svc.failure_mode: scrape returns no parseable rows OR site blocks bot
realecon.ism_svc.registered_via: Joe directive 2026-05-10 — ISM v2 spec + bug #1178

cycle_v2.headline.cycle_value.failure_mode: compute_cycle_v2.py exits non-zero / yfinance SPY fetch fails
cycle_v2.headline.cycle_value.name: Cycle & Value (Setup) headline — v2

cycle_v2.headline.market_stress.failure_mode: compute_cycle_v2.py exits non-zero / yfinance SPY fetch fails
cycle_v2.headline.market_stress.name: Market Stress (Panic) headline — v2

cycle_v2.headline.real_economy.failure_mode: compute_cycle_v2.py exits non-zero / yfinance SPY fetch fails
cycle_v2.headline.real_economy.name: Real Economy (Truth) headline — v2

cycle_v2.regime_label.failure_mode: compute_cycle_v2.py exits non-zero / yfinance SPY fetch fails
cycle_v2.regime_label.name: v2 regime label — 4-cell from Setup × Stress

market.sector_perf.name: Per-sector 1M / 3M / TTM returns + TTM realized vol (15 ETFs)
market.sector_perf.source_vendor: Supabase public.prices_eod (Massive/Polygon EOD feed + 2003+ yfinance bootstrap)
market.sector_perf.cadence: daily, 22:50 UTC weekdays — runs 5 min after v10 allocator
consumer_surfaces: Recommended Allocations (Asset Tilt) — 1M / 3M / TTM / Vol columns on every sector + defensive row
market.sector_perf.failure_mode: Supabase prices_eod read fails OR < 25 days of history for a ticker. Per-ticker fallback to nulls; one bad ticker doesn't fail the run.
market.sector_perf.registered_via: bug #1186 fix — yfinance rate-limited by Yahoo from GHA runners, swapped to Supabase per LESSONS 2026-04-30 (Polygon Basic cap) v9 pattern.
market.sector_perf.history_backfill_2026_05_12: XLK / XLC / XLRE history (2024-04-29 → 2026-04-24, 499 rows each) backfilled into public.prices_eod from Yahoo's v8 chart API direct (sandbox can hit it; GHA runners can't right now). All 15 sectors fully populated after the backfill.
